opening_line: Sorry to bother you. Someone keeps running laps in Stairwell B at night. Heavy footsteps. It's probably nothing but I can't sleep.
notes_for_player: Routine noise. CAM 06 should show normal resident exercise. Evacuation not warranted.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Stairwell B, between floors five and eight. Regular rhythm.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: Didn't see their face. Track suit. Headlamp.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Every night this week, around 2 AM. Fifteen minutes, then silence.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Your cameras probably caught it already. I just want it logged.
